goal: Create the internal namespace package for the intelligence-serving surface and route serving-facing top-level callers through it without changing serving behavior.
constraints: Do not move serving implementation files yet
Avoid circular-import churn by keeping deeper serving internals unchanged
behavioral_changes: The repo now has an internal namespace package for the intelligence-serving surface.
Serving-facing CLI and loop-controller imports now depend on that namespace instead of individual implementation modules.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import chip_labs.cli, chip_labs.loop_controller; from chip_labs.intelligence_serving import serve_context, ChipMCPServer, load_portfolio"
follow_up: Move implementation files only after all top-level serving callers are consistently routed through the namespace.
If deeper rewiring begins, audit imports carefully to avoid cycles between runtime, advisor, injector, and MCP modules.
